name: Small Business AMT Credit Offset

eligibility.description: Non-publicly traded corporations, partnerships, or sole proprietorships with average annual gross receipts of $50 million or less for the prior 3 years.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Eligible small businesses can use the Research Credit (Section 41) to offset Alternative Minimum Tax (AMT) liability, which is normally restricted for other taxpayers.
